applyTo: "src/**/ascend/**"

# Convert CUDA to NPU

When working on files under `ascend/` directories, read the full conversion skill first:

**Skill file**: `.ai/skills/convert-cuda-to-npu.md`

This skill contains the conversion rule table, conversion process steps, known limitations, and pattern library for translating CUDA Triton Kernels to NPU Triton Kernels.
